_meta.description: Every match, score, try scorer, MVP and league result for Touch This, a mixed 6-a-side touch rugby team in the GO Mammoth league, London. Machine-readable export of the team dashboard.
importantRules: One try equals one point, so a team's try count IS its match score.
League points: 3 for a win, 2 for a draw, 1 for a loss, 0 for a bye.
Bye weeks are listed separately in 'byes' and are not matches.
leagueTable is computed from leagueRounds, not stored, so it always reconciles.
Playoff matches have competition='playoff' and sit outside the league table.

fieldGuide.matches: One object per fixture. played=false means not yet played; scores are null.
fieldGuide.matches[].scorers: Who scored and how many tries. Sums to touchThisScore.
fieldGuide.matches[].lineup: Players who appeared. Appearances are derived from this.
fieldGuide.leagueRounds: Every game by every team, week by week, including games Touch This wasn't in.
fieldGuide.playerStats: Career totals derived from matches (appearances, tries, MVP awards).

seasons.name: Early Summer 2026
seasons.summary: Finished 7th of 7 in the league on 6 points, then 6th overall after the play-off. Winless, but the attack grew every week: tries per game went 0, 1, 2, 3, 7, and a different player won the MVP award each week.

seasons.name: Late Summer 2026
seasons.summary: The late summer campaign, and the season the wait ended: the first ever win arrived in week 3, 4 to 3 against Tag Me If You Can on 15 July, with the winning try on the last play of the game.

players.name: Gayatri
players.role: Co-captain. Founded the team, paid the league fee, designed the kit. Ever-present, all 7 games.

players.name: Harit
players.role: Co-captain. Ran scouting, tactics and the match reports. Ever-present, all 7 games.

players.name: Ella
players.role: Player. Guested for the Wasps in Match 5, which does not count as a TT game.

players.name: Francisco
players.role: Player. Top try scorer of the season.

players.name: Sarah
players.role: Player. G's flatmate.

players.name: Max Gutsche
players.role: Player. Missed Match 1, and Match 5 for a work event.

players.name: Helena Murray
players.role: Player. Missed Match 2 (bug).

players.name: Robert Hutchinson
players.role: Played only the final (Match 7), after supporting from the sideline all season, and scored on debut.

players.name: Bex Dunnet
players.role: Played only Match 1, then injured for the rest of the season.

players.name: Sam
players.role: Fran's friend. Debuted in Match 1 as his sourced ringer, formally joined on 26 Apr. Two standout shifts.

players.name: Martin
players.role: Sub. Quick try scorer.

players.name: Kingsley
players.role: Sub. Hat-trick and a double interception in Match 6.

players.name: Ieuan
players.role: Sub in Matches 2 and 3.

players.name: Charlotte
players.role: Sub in Match 6.

players.name: Henry
players.role: Sub in Match 7.

players.name: Sophie
players.role: Sub in Match 7.

players.name: George
players.role: Played Match 1 of Early Summer.

players.name: Lizzie
players.role: Played Match 1 of Early Summer.

players.name: Eduardo
players.role: Played Match 1 of Early Summer.

players.name: Nicole Hopper
players.role: Debuted in the Season 2 opener and won MVP for a fantastic first game.

players.name: Harry
players.role: Debuted in the Season 2 opener. Drew first blood with a knee scrape.

players.name: Marian
players.role: Debuted in the Season 2 opener.

players.name: Morgan
players.role: Debuted in the Season 2 opener.

players.name: Jas
players.role: Played Match 3 of Early Summer; Late Summer core team.

players.name: Joe
players.role: Sub. Scored twice on debut in the first ever win, including the winner with the last play, and took MVP.

players.name: Cam
players.role: Sub. Scored on debut against Churchills and took MVP.

opponents.name: Touchdown Titans v2
opponents.notes: Finished 5th. TT's first opponent (Match 1) and the 5th/6th play-off opponent (Match 7) — the same 3 to 7 scoreline both times.

opponents.name: The Dirty Dogs
opponents.notes: Finished 4th. Inflicted TT's heaviest defeat, 0 to 11 (Match 2).

opponents.name: Scoregasms
opponents.notes: Won the league and the play-off final (1st). Held TT to a single try in heavy rain (Match 3), TT's best defensive display.

opponents.name: Sponsored by Churchills
opponents.notes: Finished 2nd in Early Summer with the division's best defence. Two meetings so far, both defeats, but the gap is closing: 2 to 9 in Match 4, then 4 to 7 on 22 Jul. Fran and Harit have scored in both.

opponents.name: Wandsworth Wasps
opponents.notes: The designated rivals. Beat TT 5 to 3 in the 6th-vs-7th shootout (Match 5) but finished 7th, below TT, after losing their play-off semi heavily. Ella guested for them that week.

opponents.name: Try Hard 2: Try Harder
opponents.notes: Finished 3rd. TT's best attacking game came here: 7 tries, lost 7 to 8 (Match 6).

opponents.name: Tag Me If You Can
opponents.notes: New Late Summer opponent. TT's first ever win came at their expense at the first meeting, 4 to 3 on 15 Jul, decided by the last play of the game.

opponents.name: Touching Wands
opponents.notes: New Late Summer opponent. First meeting on 29 Jul.

opponents.name: Touch Me
opponents.notes: New Late Summer opponent. First meeting on 12 Aug.

highlights: Bex dislocated a finger, the injury that kept her out for the rest of the season, and still made it to the pub.
matches.notes: Opening game. Reported as 2 to 7 on the night; the official 3 to 7 added Max's try.

highlights: Ieuan threw over the head American football passes.
The unidentified moustache man sub reportedly outran Usain Bolt.
Rob watched from the sideline again.
matches.notes: Heaviest defeat. Called 8 to 0 on the night, corrected to 11 to 0. Opponent confirmed as The Dirty Dogs via the official results.

matches.conditions: Heavy rain, soggy pitch, a lightning scare that nearly called it off.
highlights: The single try was only just allowed by the referee.
Harit intercepted, then dropped the ball twice.
Widely felt to be the team's best performance of the season despite the scoreline, and against the eventual league winners.
matches.notes: Nearly cancelled for lightning. Held to one try by the side that went on to win the league.

highlights: Franny scored from a twinkle toes move combined with Harit.
Harit intercepted and sprinted the full length of the pitch without looking back.
A dog took a dump exactly as the opposition scored their fourth.
Gayatri intercepted a pass.
A failed diving try.
Franny ran sideways the entire length of the pitch.
matches.notes: Scored twice against the division's best defence: 2nd place and unbeaten in three at the time.

highlights: Ella guested for the Wasps and earned the double agent label, the only person connected to the team to win a game of touch all season.
Martin scored fast, then broke a lung, and added an interception inside 60 seconds.
Franny passed the ball to the referee.
Strong first half, the team bottled the second.
matches.notes: The 6th vs 7th grudge match against the designated rivals.

highlights: Closest game of the season, lost by a single try.
Kingsley made a double interception.
Someone grabbed Harit's arse.
Charlotte, a new sub, ran on smiling without knowing the rules.
matches.notes: Highest scoring game of the season: 7 tries against the eventual 3rd-placed side. A Kingsley hat-trick off the back of his double interception, two for Martin, one each for Sam and Harit.

highlights: Full circle rematch of the opening game against the same Titans, ending on the same scoreline.
Robert scored on his first ever game and shouted at the referee.
Ella was back on the correct team and got slammed to the floor.
Sam repeatedly bailed Harit out.
Henry threw the ball into touch three times.
Max and Gayatri could not finish breaks because nobody supported the run.
matches.notes: 5th place play-off. Robert scored twice on debut and Max got the third. A win meant 5th, the loss meant 6th. Originally set for 17 Jun but cancelled, no referee.

mvp.citation: Fantastic first game, got stuck in in the centre and didnt stop running

highlights: A blonde opponent kept branding Francisco a "LITTLE MONKEY" 🐵.
Fran scored Touch This's only try, with the last ball of the game.
Harit lined up two interceptions again and dropped both.
Four new players on the pitch at one time.
Ella ran a defensive masterclass on the same blonde opponent.
Harry drew first blood with a knee scrape.
matches.notes: Season 2 opener, lost 6 to 1 to the Titans at the third meeting. Nicole Hopper took MVP on debut.

mvp.citation: His second-half try, constant calling for the ball, and rage-baiting the opposition into an angry fit.

highlights: The Wasps whinged all game like a bunch of whiney babies, until the referee gave them a telling off.
Sarah decimated her ankle right at the end of the first half.
Nicole and Jas both went agonisingly close to a try.
Fran turned out for the first half despite having football the same day.
The team's new socks made their debut, and they were much loved.
One little annoying opposition player, possibly French (no offence).
matches.notes: Week 2 against the designated rivals, lost 8 to 2. Harit scored in the first half and Robert in the second; Robert took MVP for the try, his non-stop calling for the ball, and winding an opposition player into a fury.

mvp.citation: Two tries on debut: the first off an interception in the opening exchanges, the second the winner with the last play of the game.

highlights: Joe scored on the first interception of the game.
There was a tree in the middle of the pitch.
Fran turned up in a suit.
It stayed 3 to 3 until the last play of the game.
The winner went Joe to G to Rob and back to Joe, who fumbled it and scored anyway.
A nervous game throughout.
Gayatri popped her Tryvigity: her first ever try, in her eighth game.
matches.notes: The first ever win. Nine defeats and 84 days on from game one, TT beat new opponents Tag Me If You Can 4 to 3, decided by the last play of the game. Joe from Wales scored twice on debut and took MVP; Gayatri scored her first ever try.

mvp.citation: For scoring for without even touching the line.

highlights: Fran side-stepped his way to both of his tries.
Rob went for three interceptions, the Rob special.
G's hot potato.
Manifesting touches.
matches.notes: Week 4 against Sponsored by Churchills, lost 7 to 4 at the second meeting. Fran scored twice, Harit and Cam once each; Cam took MVP on debut. Four tries matches the season high set in the first win, and the deficit against Churchills narrowed from seven to three.
No TT fixture shown on 5 Aug (likely a bye week) — to confirm.
Potential play-off semi-final; opponent and slot depend on where TT finishes. Slots 18:30 / 19:10 / 19:50.

byes.notes: Bye week. Poor weather; the team chose to rest.
